Ideal for homebuyers and investors alike, the property presents an opportunity to be part of a vibrant and growing community.Property SpecificationsSpread across a super built-up area of 1092 sq. ft, this well-planned apartment is designed to provide a comfortable and efficient living experience. The intelligently designed layout ensures optimal utilisation of space while maintaining a seamless flow between living, dining and private areas.Situated on the 22nd floor of a 22-storey tower, the apartment enjoys excellent natural light, ventilation and expansive views of the surroundings. The elevated position enhances privacy and creates a refreshing living environment away from the bustle of ground-level activity. Offered in an unfurnished condition, the apartment provides buyers with complete flexibility to customise the interiors according to their individual preferences and lifestyle requirements.Being a resale unit in an under-construction development, the property offers the advantage of securing a home in a highly sought-after project while benefiting from the future growth potential of the area. The contemporary planning and quality construction associated with the development further add to its appeal.FacilitiesThe apartments high-floor location ensures abundant natural light, improved airflow and impressive views. The unfurnished configuration allows complete freedom in interior design and furnishing choices. The thoughtfully planned layout maximises functionality and comfort, making it suitable for modern urban living. Residents will benefit from being part of a professionally developed residential community known for quality construction and contemporary planning.LocalityBagaluru has emerged as one of North Bangalores most promising residential corridors due to its strategic location and growing infrastructure. The area enjoys excellent connectivity to major employment hubs, business districts, educational institutions and healthcare facilities. Proximity to key road networks enhances accessibility and supports convenient daily commuting. The locality is witnessing significant residential and commercial development, contributing to its strong appreciation potential. Combining a reputed development, modern design and a rapidly evolving location, this apartment presents an excellent opportunity to own a home in Godrej Ananda, Bagaluru.

resultList.dtldesc: This premium 4 BHK apartment in ASSETZ CANVAS and COVE 2.0, Begur Road, Bangalore, offers an exceptional blend of luxury, space, and investment potential. Spread across 2337 sq. ft super built-up area, this east-facing residence is positioned on the 16th floor of a 25-storey tower, providing breathtaking lake views, abundant natural light, and excellent cross ventilation. Located directly opposite Begur Lake, this premium corner unit enjoys a highly desirable position within the development, making it an ideal choice for discerning homebuyers seeking a prestigious address in South Bangalore.Property SpecificationsThe apartment features 4 spacious bedrooms with a thoughtfully designed layout that maximises comfort and functionality. Offered in unfurnished condition, it provides buyers with complete flexibility to create interiors according to their preferences. Situated in Tower C, the residence benefits from its premium corner positioning, ensuring enhanced privacy and panoramic views. The east-facing entrance is complemented by spacious living and dining areas, creating an inviting atmosphere for family living and entertaining. High-quality vitrified flooring enhances the elegance of the interiors while ensuring durability and easy maintenance. The apartment overlooks the swimming pool and enjoys uninterrupted views of Begur Lake, making it one of the standout units within the project.FacilitiesDeveloped by Assetz Property Group, the project offers a comprehensive range of modern lifestyle amenities designed for luxury living. Residents can enjoy landscaped gardens, a clubhouse, swimming pool, fitness facilities, childrens play areas, recreational zones, and dedicated community spaces. The project has received approval from the Bangalore Development Authority, further enhancing buyer confidence. As the construction is in an advanced stage nearing completion, buyers benefit from significantly reduced execution and delivery risks compared to newly launched projects.LocalityStrategically located on Begur Road, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to major employment hubs, educational institutions, healthcare centres, and retail destinations across South Bangalore. Connectivity is further enhanced by easy access to Metro networks, NICE Road, Electronic City, Bannerghatta Road, and other prominent commercial corridors. Reputed schools, hospitals, shopping centres, supermarkets, and entertainment venues are located within convenient reach, making this location highly attractive for both end-users and long-term investors seeking capital appreciation and premium lifestyle benefits.

Public transport options are readily available, providing seamless connectivity to other parts of Bangalore. This prime location ensures that residents enjoy both convenience and comfort in their everyday lives.
